description:
• Mini stepper is widely used for weight loss, slim legs, buttock lifting, body shaping etc.. Made of steel, the stepper can hold up to 330.7lbs. Come with 2 removable resistance bands, you can get a comprehensive workout to tone your arms, shoulders, back and chest muscles, too! You can use those fragmented time to step while watching TV, during work or before training etc.. Keep working out with our stepper every day. More stepping, less weight, healthier figure!

    Feature：

    Full Body Workout: Widely used for weight loss, slim legs, buttock lifting, body shaping etc.. The 2 removable resistance bands provide a comprehensive workout to tone your arms, shoulders, back and chest muscles.

     

    Portable Stair Stepper: Easy to carry. You can use those fragmented time to step while watching TV, during work or before training etc.. More stepping, less weight, healthier figure.

     

    Easy To Use: No installation needed. Just push the power button and start stepping! The triangle knob in the front can help you adjust the intensity of your workout.

     

    Considerate Design: Made of steel, the stepper can hold up to 330.7lbs. The pedals are non-slip and quiet.

     

    LCD Monitor: Easy to read. Shows your workout time, steps per minute, calorie consumption, frequency.

    Specification:

    Product Type: Mini Stepper
    Material: Steel
    Color: Grey
    Max Load Bearing: 150kg/330.7lbs
    Per Resistance Band Length: 95cm/37.4in
    Item Size: 27.7*38*18.5cm/11*15*7.3in
    Item Weight: 4.75kg/10.5lbs
    Package Size: 35*23*42cm/13.77*9.05*16.53in
    Package Weight: 5.7kg/12.5lbs

    PackageContents：

    1 x Mini Stepper
    1 x Triangle Fastener
    1 x Wrench
    2 x Resistance Bands
    1 x User Manual
